_comment: Default forgewright config. Built-in workflows (feature, bug-fix, refactor, idea-exploration, greenfield) live in forgewright/workflows/*.json and run as-is when not overridden under "workflows" below. Define a workflow under a NEW name to add one; redefining a built-in name (e.g. "feature") overrides the built-in entirely — be intentional about that. See forgewright.example.json for a copyable example of custom workflows with reaudit overrides, tests overrides, and multi-output command phases. Every phase requires a `name` field — non-empty, identifier-safe ([A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]*), unique within the workflow.
